name: text
description: Body text with size, weight, and muted variants

meta.name: Text
meta.description: Body text with size, weight, and muted variants

props.name: as
props.description: The HTML element to render as.

props.name: muted
props.description: When true, renders in a muted/subtle color.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: <Text>Body copy reads at the base size.</Text>

examples.title: Inline span
examples.description: Use as="span" inside other flow content

whenToUse: Rendering body copy, paragraphs, and inline text in app UI
Applying size/weight/muted treatment to secondary or emphasized text
whenNotToUse: Section or page titles — use Heading for the document outline

antiPatterns.bad: <Text size="lg" weight="semibold"> used as a page title
antiPatterns.why: Visually-large Text has no heading semantics, so it is missing from the document outline

related.name: Heading
related.reason: Heading carries outline semantics; Text is plain body copy

intent.a11yRationale: Renders the chosen native element (p/span/div) without imposing roles; muted styling keeps contrast within AA so secondary text stays readable

content.tone: Plain body voice; the component does not constrain copy
content.notes: Use muted sparingly for genuinely secondary information

flexibility.note: Choose element and treatment to fit context
Font, leading, and color must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens
